source.expression: $selected_ids = $wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT attachment_id FROM $wpdb->ewwwio_queue WHERE gallery = %s AND scanned = 0 LIMIT %d", $gallery, $limit ) )

chain.expression: $selected_ids = $wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT attachment_id FROM $wpdb->ewwwio_queue WHERE gallery = %s AND scanned = 0 LIMIT %d", $gallery, $limit ) )

source.expression: $selected_ids = $wpdb->get_col( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT attachment_id FROM $wpdb->ewwwio_queue WHERE gallery = %s AND scanned = 1 ORDER BY attachment_id DESC LIMIT %d", $gallery, $limit ) )

source.expression:
add_query_arg(
					array(
						'page'       => 'ewww-ngg-bulk',
						'_wpnonce'   => sanitize_key( $_REQUEST['_wpnonce'] ),
						'bulk_type'  => $type,
						'bulkaction' => 'bulk_optimize',
						'doaction'   => array_map( 'intval', wp_unslash( $_REQUEST['doaction'] ) ), // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.ValidatedSanitizedInput.InputNotSanitized
					),
					admin_url( 'admin.php' )
				)

chain.expression:
wp_safe_redirect(
				add_query_arg(
					array(
						'page'       => 'ewww-ngg-bulk',
						'_wpnonce'   => sanitize_key( $_REQUEST['_wpnonce'] ),
						'bulk_type'  => $type,
						'bulkaction' => 'bulk_optimize',
						'doaction'   => array_map( 'intval', wp_unslash( $_REQUEST['doaction'] ) ), // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.ValidatedSanitizedInput.InputNotSanitized
					),
					admin_url( 'admin.php' )
				)
			)

sink.expression:
wp_safe_redirect(
				add_query_arg(
					array(
						'page'       => 'ewww-ngg-bulk',
						'_wpnonce'   => sanitize_key( $_REQUEST['_wpnonce'] ),
						'bulk_type'  => $type,
						'bulkaction' => 'bulk_optimize',
						'doaction'   => array_map( 'intval', wp_unslash( $_REQUEST['doaction'] ) ), // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.ValidatedSanitizedInput.InputNotSanitized
					),
					admin_url( 'admin.php' )
				)
			)

unserialize() called without the allowed_classes option set to false (or a whitelist). Without this restriction, all classes available in the autoloader may be instantiated, enabling Object Injection attacks. Use unserialize($data, ['allowed_classes' => false]).
